brand_action.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Dense, grid-based, 'Control Room' mode for Dashboards
spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: p-4 md:p-6 for standard cards, p-8 for main sections
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px-4px) to maintain rigid structure
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for data and tables, minimal center-alignment. Optical alignment applied.

surface_styles.cards: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 shadow-none hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors
surface_styles.header: bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-800 sticky top-0 z-50

components_instructions.buttons: Square edges, high contrast. Use 'bg-white text-black' for primary CTAs.
components_instructions.inputs: Shadcn standard but customized to zero/minimal border-radius. bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800 focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white.
components_instructions.tables: Dense rows, transparent backgrounds. Highlight rows on hover with bg-zinc-900. Status pills should use functional colors.
components_instructions.dialogs: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800, dark overlay (bg-black/80). Keep it flat, no heavy shadows.
components_instructions.tabs: Underline or solid block active state. Not pills.
components_instructions.badges: Square, subtle background tint, high contrast text.
components_instructions.navigation: Vertical sidebar with clear active states (white text, zinc-800 bg). 'Hamburger' menu for mobile, visible sidebar on desktop.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle border color shifts (zinc-800 to zinc-600) and text brightness shifts.
motion_and_interactions.click: No bouncy scales. Immediate state change or very quick transform: scale(0.98).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out for states. No 'transition-all'.
motion_and_interactions.loading: ASCII art loaders or simple pure white spinners.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Focus rings must be solid white and highly visible. aria-hidden on purely decorative elements.

images.description: Dark architectural shot for login screen background

media.icons: Use lucide-react (default) or Phosphor Icons for dense data. Prefer rigid, functional icon shapes.

app_specific_instructions.pin_login: Minimalist center modal over dark background. Huge digits. data-testid='pin-input'.
app_specific_instructions.clock_in_out: Massive typography for current time. Two dominant buttons: 'ENTRATA' (Green) / 'USCITA' (Red).
app_specific_instructions.shift_handover: Two prominent text areas. Requires a checkbox 'Confermo lettura consegne' to proceed.
app_specific_instructions.logistics_laundry: 32 grid cells or a dense list showing the 3 shifts. Color-coded (Red/Green) for washed/pending.
app_specific_instructions.planimetria: Visual layout of 32 rooms. CSS Grid based. Red = Occupied/Issue, Green = Clear.
app_specific_instructions.export_pdf: Provide a clean, printable view format (black text on white bg specifically for print `@media print`).

testing.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='login-submit-button'`, `data-testid='clock-in-button'`).
